Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}All I did was mention the {f 4 4 0 37 1 16788}. Why is this happening to me...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30094 0 0}So that's how you assemble a beverage... How very intriguing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}You don't need to think that hard about it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30096 0 0}Er, I-I'll give it another shot. Maybe I'll figure it out with another cup![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}Aigis-san hasn't touched hers yet. Would you like to try that one, too?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30044 0 0}I'm not! This is a really, really big deal to me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30090 0 0}Yes, of course! Since it was your cup to begin with, Sister, I'll be sure to savor it a hundredfold![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}Um... How does it taste this time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}How? They were both brewed with the same coffee beans. There can't be that big of a difference...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}You can technically assign quantifiable values for comparison, but it's difficult to present the outputted data clearly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 11 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30106 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 11 25 25}It's also unnecessary when the fact is... receiving this cup from my sister is what makes it better![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7120 0 0}I just wanted to hear your impressions on the flavor profile...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7037 0 0}Oh, you don't have anything to be sorry about, Aigis-san...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}Why's it so hard to brew a good cup...?[n]{f 1 1}
